blocked_prediction_inputs: native contacts, distance maps, residue-residue proximity, and coordinate-derived topology
native biological assembly contacts and ligand/metal coordination geometry before sealing
AlphaFold, ESMFold, RoseTTAFold, or other structure models before sealing
post-seal validation annotations before prediction hash
prior score outcomes as prediction evidence
internal runtime artifacts as biological evidence

prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: CRYSTAL STRUCTURE OF THE XLP PROTEIN SAP IN COMPLEX WITH A SLAM PEPTIDE. Entity description: T CELL SIGNAL TRANSDUCTION MOLECULE SAP. Organism: Homo sapiens. Polymer composition: heteromeric protein. V71 shard: V71D_COILED_COIL_HELIX_BUNDLE_MULTIDOMAIN_ENRICHED. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived membrane tendency high; no membrane topology without explicit E66 topology evidence; sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies; withheld discovery hints: generic_complex_not_assembly_required. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V71 E66 metadata context marks: generic_complex_only. Known E66 words are allowed; candidate E67 labels are withheld from prediction. generic complex alone is not assembly_required_core. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: generic complex wording is not treated as obligate assembly evidence

v71_context_policy.context_derivation: V71 E66 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. E66-known words are allowed; candidate E67 words are withheld from prediction context so V71 can discover them.
reasons: generic complex wording is not treated as obligate assembly evidence
